items.summary: On the backend, when a request is made to retrieve or download an attachment or image blob, check whether the parent paste has expired before returning any data. If the paste is expired, refuse to serve the attachment and return an error (e.g., #expired or equivalent variant). Do not rely solely on UI-side expiration gating.

On the frontend, in PasteViewPage.tsx, before triggering a file or image download, perform a fresh expiration check against the backend (re-fetch or re-validate the paste) at the moment the user clicks the download button. If the paste is found to be expired at that point, abort the download and display the expired error state instead of proceeding with the download.
